caption: A man wearing a white long-sleeved shirt and a maroon vest speaks while gesturing with his hand near his face. He is positioned inside a vehicle, and a microphone with an "ANI" logo is held in front of him. The scene is presented as a news broadcast with various on-screen graphics. A red "BREAKING NEWS" banner runs across the bottom, accompanied by a timestamp of "10:04 PM". On the left, there is a portrait of a man with the text "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार", and on the right, another portrait with the text "मंत्री विजेन्द्र यादव" and "श्रवण कुमार" below it. The top header of the first frame reads "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'". In subsequent frames, the header changes to "2024 में J" and then "2024 में JDU के साथ". Throughout the sequence, the man continues speaking and gesturing, while the surrounding news graphics and portraits remain constant.
